name: Seeded type-tree v2 (E4: hybrid type-tree + global kNN)
description: Hybrid variant of seeded-typetree-v2. Adds a `hybrid.mode` knob: 'off' (control = v2), 'typed-knn' (inject global cosine kNN filtered to retrieved types), 'strict-knn' (inject global cosine kNN minus Mutation/Subscription), 'rrf-fusion' (per-type RRF-fuse local cos+lex order with per-type-filtered global kNN order), 'knn-rerank' (per-type top-rerankPoolSize by formula, then re-rank by raw cosine). Eval port approximates the parent's per-type BM25/trigram+cosine type retrieval with a cosine-aggregated type score plus identifier-token + 3-gram overlap on type/field names (no description text, no precomputed type indexes in the eval snapshot); the per-field lex bonus is approximated from token + trigram overlap on field names (no BM25 / trigram index). Defaults mirror the parent strategy's defaultConfig (hybrid.mode='off').
